en.extract:
The yellow-bellied prinia (Prinia flaviventris) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae.
It is found in Pakistan, the southern Himalayan foothills, the northeastern Indian subcontinent, and Southeast Asia.

[[File:Yellow-bellied Prinia - Taiwan_S4E9702 (17133168450).jpg|thumb]]

The '''yellow-bellied prinia''' ('''''Prinia flaviventris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]].
It is found in [[Pakistan]], the southern [[Himalayas|Himalayan]] foothills, the northeastern [[Indian subcontinent]], and [[Southeast Asia]].

zh.extract:
黄腹鹪莺（學名：Prinia flaviventris），又名灰头鹪莺，为扇尾鶯科鹪莺属的鸟类。该物种的模式产地在不丹。。鷦鶯屬的鳥類在臺灣俗稱望冬䳂仔（臺羅：bāng-tang-tiú-á）、望冬仔（臺羅：bāng-tang-á）；而望冬䳂仔（臺羅：bāng-tang-tiú-á）也用來形容小朋友如鷦鶯般活潑好動。


亚种
黄腹鹪莺云南亚种（Prinia flaviventris delacouri）。在中国大陆，分布于云南等地。该物种的模式产地在泰国。
黄腹鹪莺华南亚种（Prinia flaviventris sonitans）。在中国大陆，分布于贵州、广西、广东、海南、福建等地。该物种的模式产地在福建。
